name: GEICO 500
comments: Tyler Reddick won the GEICO 500 at Talladega Superspeedway, his sixth NASCAR Cup Series victory.Prior to the start the following car dropped to the rear of the field under penalty for the reason indicated: #5(unapproved adjustments).
